sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, data XML);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, data) VALUES (1, xte_nodebld_init(NULL));
UPDATE test_table SET data = xte_nodebld_init(NULL) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, data FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT xte_nodebld_init(NULL) AS new_data FROM DUAL;
